repos.name: google-research/timesfm
repos.desc: TimesFM (Time Series Foundation Model) is a pretrained time-series foundation model developed by Google Research for time-series forecasting.

repos.name: n0-computer/iroh
repos.desc: IP addresses break, dial keys instead. Modular networking stack in Rust.

repos.name: freeCodeCamp/freeCodeCamp
repos.desc: freeCodeCamp.org's open-source codebase and curriculum. Learn math, programming, and computer science for free.

repos.name: obra/superpowers
repos.desc: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.

repos.name: zai-org/GLM-5
repos.desc: GLM-5: From Vibe Coding to Agentic Engineering

repos.name: DeusData/codebase-memory-mcp
repos.desc: High-performance code intelligence MCP server. Indexes codebases into a persistent knowledge graph — average repo in milliseconds. 158 languages, sub-ms queries, 99% fewer tokens. Single static binary, zero dependencies.

repos.name: alibaba/zvec
repos.desc: A lightweight, lightning-fast, in-process vector database

repos.name: Kilo-Org/kilocode
repos.desc: Kilo is the all-in-one agentic engineering platform. Build, ship, and iterate faster with the most popular open source coding agent.

repos.name: makeplane/plane
repos.desc: 🔥🔥🔥 Open-source Jira, Linear, Monday, and ClickUp alternative. Plane is a modern project management platform to manage tasks, sprints, docs, and triage.

repos.name: Kong/insomnia
repos.desc: The open-source, cross-platform API client for GraphQL, REST, WebSockets, SSE and gRPC. With Cloud, Local and Git storage.

repos.name: Universal-Debloater-Alliance/universal-android-debloater-next-generation
repos.desc: Cross-platform GUI written in Rust using ADB to debloat non-rooted Android devices. Improve your privacy, the security and battery life of your device.

repos.name: dotnet/aspnetcore
repos.desc: ASP.NET Core is a cross-platform .NET framework for building modern cloud-based web applications on Windows, Mac, or Linux.

repos.name: owainlewis/awesome-artificial-intelligence
repos.desc: A curated list of Artificial Intelligence (AI) courses, books, video lectures and papers.

repos.name: Lightricks/LTX-2
repos.desc: Official Python inference and LoRA trainer package for the LTX-2 audio–video generative model.

repos.name: LibreTranslate/LibreTranslate
repos.desc: Free and Open Source Machine Translation API. Self-hosted, offline capable and easy to setup.
